visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) In a brightly lit warehouse environment, a woman with long black hair wearing a white fluffy cardigan over a dark dress stands next to a large stack of purple and green boxes. She gestures enthusiastically toward the products. (2) The camera zooms in on a specific green and purple box featuring illustrations of rolled chips, which the woman holds up. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor room with soft lighting. Two women sit behind a table; one is the woman from the warehouse, and the other wears a black and white patterned bucket hat. They hold small green bags of chips. (4) A close-up shot shows the interior of a green bag, revealing dozens of thin, orange-colored rolled snack sticks. (5) The two women taste the snacks, smiling and nodding with high-energy facial expressions. They hold up the individual rolled chips and point at them while looking directly at the camera.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: Costco Wholesale. [Variety]: 來來來. [Subtitle]: 最新出爐. (2) [Subtitle]: 7小時前新上的. 多力多滋迷們出動了. 青花椒風味多力多滋捲. [Variety]: 超麻超爽. (3) [Subtitle]: 而且還是捲的耶. 啊哇然後搭配青花椒. 因為以前多力多滋只吃起司口味. 青花椒耶怎麼那麼懂選. 一下起司下一個青花椒. 懂選味道. (4) [Subtitle]: 回去看有沒有真的好吃. 他這一盒是229. [Logo]: $ 259. (5) [Subtitle]: 多力多滋青花椒風味多力多滋捲259元. 裡面有8包. 所以每一袋是32.3塊錢. (6) [Subtitle]: 因為捲起來所以量看起來好少喔. (7) [Subtitle]: 注意看多力多滋把它的餅乾捲起來了. 新口味青花椒風味. 吃起來呢一入口就是那個像麻辣鍋一樣. 那個青花椒的香味在你嘴裡爆發. (8) [Subtitle]: 然後你吃第一根的話只會麻麻. 但吃到第四根的話就會有點微微辣辣. 但是又麻麻香香的感覺. 所以如果你喜歡鹹辣餅乾的話一定要試試看. (9) [Subtitle]: 然後它把它捲起來呢老實說我們沒有那麼喜歡. 可是它就是口感變得更硬更脆. 如果你很喜歡那種嚼嚼嚼的人個不喜歡. (10) [Subtitle]: 但是總體來說我覺得這個調味是成功的. 沒錯還非常的麻. 然後一包小小包只要60克. 吃了也部會就是太辛苦. 然後或者打開沒吃完怕軟掉. 我覺得非常適合家庭購買喲.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long black hair and wears a white fluffy cardigan; the other has short dark hair and wears a black and white bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First scene is a Costco warehouse with high shelves and cardboard product boxes. Second scene is a home interior with a couch and warm ambient lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-energy female voice speaks Mandarin with a bright and animated tone. Behind her, a fast-tempo electronic pop track with a heavy synth beat plays continuously. (2) The vocal track continues with rapid speech and high pitch variability. Faint background room tone from a large space is present but muffled. (3) A second female voice joins, creating a lively dialogue. The sound of plastic bag rustling (high frequency transient) is heard. (4) A sharp digital 'Ding' sound effect emphasizes a point. The voices maintain a high arousal level. (5) Audible percussive 'crunch' sounds occur intermittently as the speakers eat. The background music remains constant in volume and tempo until the end of the clip.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review a new flavor of Doritos found at Costco, providing information on price and taste to encourage viewers to try the product.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Organic product review style without explicit sponsorship disclosure.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy social media style food review with dense text overlays and upbeat music typical of short-form video platforms.
